posts.author: JDAY (Jared Yousif)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Morning Community,

I am currently using the Super Forms Integration in our Project Request and Proposal Board. I am trying to create the PDF of the Form so I can use it as a trigger to send out an email. The problem is when I go to submit the filled out form it gives me a partial submission notice because the PDF failed upload in the column.

Any Ideas why?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jared,

Sorry you’re having issues with the app!

Because it is a third-party app I am afraid I can’t assist too in-depthly, that said, I’d recommend reaching out to the apps developer directly - rnd@spot-nik.com
